title: Feature files: import and authoring behaviors
description: Godog .feature files covering: import from Claude JSON, import from Codex TOML, merge collision four-way prompt, push commit generation.
notes: Six review lanes completed. Feature file created for Claude JSON import, Codex TOML import, merge collision prompt, and push commit generation. Safety findings drove path traversal and collision rejection tests in library authoring. Verification: tests/lint pass.

title: Feature files: sync and drift behaviors
description: Godog .feature files covering: status states, sync apply, partial failure, resumable sync, pin mismatch hard block, auth warning trigger.
notes: Six review lanes completed. Feature file created for status states, sync apply, partial failure, resumable sync, pin mismatch block, and auth warning. Safety findings drove additional unit tests for pin nil-handler, docker arg safety, and auth warning expansion. Verification: tests/lint pass.

title: Feature files: project init and pick behaviors
description: Godog .feature files covering: init with target selection, pick TUI selections, idempotent re-pick, graft.lock state after pick.
notes: Six review lanes completed. Feature file created for init target selection, pick TUI selections, idempotent re-pick, and lock state after pick. Init scenario has executable assertions for graft.lock, .mcp.json, and .codex/config.toml creation. Verification: Godog suite passes.

title: Feature files: library management behaviors
description: Godog .feature files covering: registering a library, pulling updates, browsing MCPs, detecting unknown library on bootstrap.
notes: Six review lanes completed. Feature file created for library add, pull, show, and unknown-library bootstrap scenarios. Review conflict: prose coverage vs executable assertions; chose exact step registration now and left deeper command-level fixtures to implementation tasks. Verification: Godog suite passes without catch-all.

title: gremlins mutation testing setup
description: Add gremlins. Configure mutation targets (internal/ packages). Add make target: make mutation-test. Document acceptable mutation score threshold.
notes: Six review lanes completed. Linter requested reproducible tooling. Resolution: Makefile mutation-test target added using Gremlins against internal/...; docs/testing.md documents 70 percent initial mutation threshold. Verification: Makefile parses; full test/lint gates pass.

title: mockgen setup and interface mocks
description: Add mockgen. Generate mocks for: render.Adapter, pin.Handler, library.Client, config.Store, lock.Store. Mocks live in internal/*/mock/.
notes: Six review lanes completed. /golang-code-style and /golang-linter blocked on hand-written mocks conflicting with explicit mockgen requirement. Conflict: lightweight fakes vs generated mocks; explicit Beads requirement won. Resolution: mockgen pinned to go.uber.org/mock/mockgen@v0.6.0, generated mocks for render.Adapter, pin.Handler, library.Client, config.Store, lock.Store under internal/*/mock, gomock dependency added. Verification: go generate ./internal/... and go test ./... pass.

title: Godog test infrastructure setup
description: Add godog dependency. Create features/ directory structure. Wire step definitions. Configure test runner in Makefile.
notes: Six review lanes completed. /golang-cli and /golang-testing blocked on vacuous Godog catch-all steps. Conflict: broad no-op feature skeleton vs executable BDD; chose exact step bindings plus real init scenario assertions while keeping broader scenario text as explicit pending expansion. Resolution: Godog dependency added, features/ structure added, Makefile bdd-test added, catch-all removed, exact steps wired. Verification: go test ./features and go test ./... pass.

title: Auto-registration prompt
description: Show library name + URL found in lock. Prompt: Register and clone it now? [Y/n]. On yes: run graft library add. On no: exit with clear message about what to do manually.

title: Unknown library detection on graft.lock load
description: When reading graft.lock, check each library name against user config. If unknown, extract URL from lock and trigger auto-registration flow.

title: graft install-hooks --uninstall
description: Remove graft marker block from shell rc file. Delete .git/hooks/post-checkout if graft-owned (check marker comment).

title: Git post-checkout hook script
description: Written to .git/hooks/post-checkout. Runs graft status --quiet. Executable bit set. Marker comment for idempotency.

title: Shell hook script
description: Appended snippet: command -v graft and [[ -f graft.lock ]] check before running graft status --quiet on cd. Marker comment for idempotency.

title: graft install-hooks command
description: Write shell hook to ~/.zshrc or ~/.bashrc (detect from /bin/zsh). Write git post-checkout hook to .git/hooks/. Both idempotent with graft marker comment. Report what was written.

title: Migration --auto flag
description: Apply rename and set_default steps automatically. require_input steps always pause for human input. Skip MCPs with unresolved require_input and flag as pending_input in status.

title: Migration step executors
description: Implement step types: rename (field path rename), set_default (inject default value), require_input (prompt user for value, always interactive regardless of --auto).

title: Migration chain resolver
description: Given installed version and current version, find and order migration files in migrations/<name>/<from>-to-<to>.json. Chain multi-hop jumps. Error if chain is broken.

title: Unknown runtime warning
description: If command has no registered pin handler, warn: no pin handler for runtime X. MCP will run unpinned. Do not block — just warn.

title: Hard block enforcement + --force with friction
description: On pin mismatch: hard block with clear error. --force allowed but requires user to type 'I understand the risk'. Print SECURITY WARNING with diff of pins.

title: uvx/uv pin handler
description: Detect command=uvx/uv. Validate package version + sha256 hash. Inject pinned version at render time.

title: Docker pin handler
description: Detect command=docker. Validate image digest (sha256). Inject @sha256:... digest into image reference. Tags are not accepted as pins.

title: npm/npx pin handler
description: Detect command=npx/node. Validate package version + sha512 integrity hash. Inject pinned version into args at render time.

title: Pin handler registry interface
description: Define internal/pin.Handler interface: Detect(command string) bool, Validate(pin Pin, installedVersion string) error, Inject(pin Pin, args []string) []string. Registry maps runtime name to handler.

title: Resumable sync
description: Skip MCPs already at current library version. Only process MCPs still showing drift. Partial-success reporting: list succeeded, failed, skipped.

title: Auth warning system
description: Detect auth-related fields: env keys matching *TOKEN*, *SECRET*, *KEY*, *PASSWORD*, *CREDENTIAL*, bearer_token_env_var, oauth blocks, headers.Authorization. Print hard-to-miss warning. Default N. No --yes bypass on auth operations.

title: Per-MCP atomic write
description: Write to temp file first, rename into place. On failure: discard temp, preserve previous state. Lock only updated for successful MCPs.

title: graft sync command
description: Auto-pull library. For each out-of-date MCP (or named args): resolve migration chain, apply steps, render via adapters, update graft.lock. --no-pull flag for offline use.

title: External edit detection
description: Detect when .mcp.json or .codex/config.toml has been modified outside graft. Warn user. Do not overwrite silently.

title: graft status command
description: Render status table: MCP name, state icon, version installed vs library. Show drift summary and run hints. --quiet flag (exit 0/1). --json flag.

title: Seven-state detection logic
description: Implement state resolver: uninitialized, initialized, configured, drifted, pinmismatch, pending_input, unknown_library. Compare definition_hash in lock vs library index SHA-256.

title: Codex adapter (.codex/config.toml)
description: Renders canonical definition to .codex/config.toml [mcp_servers.*] sections. Handles adapters.codex overrides. Manages only graft-owned sections. Does not touch non-MCP config.

title: Claude Code adapter (.mcp.json)
description: Renders canonical definition to .mcp.json mcpServers format. Handles adapters.claude overrides.  and default env expansion passthrough. Manages only graft-owned entries in file.

title: Adapter interface definition
description: Define internal/render.Adapter interface: Render(mcp Definition) error, Remove(name string) error, TargetFile() string. All adapters implement this.

title: Confirm and write selections to graft.lock
description: On confirm, diff new selection against current lock. Write updated graft.lock. Trigger render adapters for added MCPs. Remove entries for deselected MCPs.

title: Idempotent pre-selection from graft.lock
description: On launch, read graft.lock and pre-check currently installed MCPs. Re-running pick preserves existing selections as starting state.

title: Library-grouped checkbox list component
description: Render MCPs grouped by library. Show name, description, tags per row. [x] for selected, [ ] for available. Scrollable if list exceeds terminal height.

title: Bubbletea + lipgloss TUI scaffold
description: Wire bubbletea model into graft pick command. lipgloss color scheme. Keyboard nav: space=toggle, enter=confirm, q/ctrl-c=cancel.

title: Target file creation (.mcp.json and .codex/config.toml)
description: Create empty .mcp.json and/or .codex/config.toml based on selected targets. Do not overwrite if existing. Stage both for git tracking.

title: graft init command
description: Check for existing graft.lock (prompt on re-run). Ask which library (default from config). Ask targets: Claude/Codex/Both. Write minimal graft.lock. Create empty target files. Launch graft pick immediately.

title: internal/library package
description: Git operations on local library cache. library.json and mcps/<name>.json parsing. Index recomputation. SHA-256 helpers for definition files.

title: graft mcp push
description: Recompute library.json index (all SHA-256 hashes, sorted by name). Show git diff. Auto-generated commit message (feat(mcps): ...). git add + commit + push. --yes for non-interactive. Report commit SHA.

title: graft mcp edit <name>
description: Open mcps/<name>.json in /usr/bin/pico. Recompute SHA-256 after save. Update library.json index.

title: graft mcp add <name>
description: Interactive form to author a new MCP definition. Prompts for all fields. Writes mcps/<name>.json to local library cache.

title: graft mcp import --from <file>
description: Auto-detect format (JSON=Claude, TOML=Codex). Parse each server entry. Generate canonical mcps/<name>.json with base fields + adapter block. Auto-generate cross-compat adapter (best-effort). Auth fields prompt confirmation. Four-way merge prompt on collision: keep/use-new/editor/skip.

title: graft library show <name> <mcp> (detail view)
description: Full definition schema for a single MCP rendered to terminal. Shows all fields including adapter blocks.

title: graft library show [name] (list view)
description: Tabular list of all MCPs in a library: name, version, tags, description. --tag filter. --json flag.

title: graft library pull [name]
description: Git fetch/pull latest from remote for named library (or all if no name). Update local cache. Report new commit SHA.

title: graft library list
description: Display all registered libraries. Show name, URL, local cache path, last pulled timestamp, default marker.

title: graft library add <name> <url>
description: Register a new library in user config. Validate git URL. Clone to local cache path. Set as default if first library.

title: internal/lock package
description: Read/write graft.lock at project root. Structs: Lock, LibraryRef, InstalledMCP. SHA-256 computation helpers.
notes: Review lanes completed. Findings: lock writes were non-atomic; hash helpers under-tested. Conflict: simple whole-file helper acceptable for small lock files, but atomic writes required for crash safety. Resolution: lock save uses AtomicWriteFile; lock round-trip and HashFile tests added. Verification passed.

title: internal/config package
description: Read/write ~/.config/graft/config.json. Structs: Config, Library entry. XDG-compliant path resolution. Marshaling/unmarshaling.
notes: Review lanes completed. Findings: XDG path coverage missing; default cache path could become relative; writes were non-atomic. Conflict: simple os.WriteFile vs shared atomic helper; safety requirement won. Resolution: config save uses AtomicWriteFile, WithLibrary returns errors for cache path resolution, XDG tests added. Verification passed.

title: Cobra root command and CLI entry point
description: main.go + cmd/root.go. Version flag. Global --config flag for non-default config path.
notes: Review lanes completed: /golang-cli blocked on missing cobra.NoArgs, exit-code classification, weak command tests; /golang-code-style and /golang-design-patterns flagged large command surface and concrete deps; /golang-testing blocked on command contract coverage. Conflict: broad bootstrap file vs split command files; chose to keep bootstrap file for this foundation pass but enforce CLI contracts and defer file split. Resolution: NoArgs added to no-arg commands, ExitCode maps usage errors to 2, init writes targets before lock, sync wires adapters, command tests added. Verification passed.

title: go mod init and module setup
description: Run go mod init, set module path github.com/poconnor/graft. Add go.work if needed.
notes: Review lanes /golang-cli, /golang-code-style, /golang-design-patterns, /golang-linter, /golang-safety, /golang-testing completed. Findings: Makefile lint needed pinned v2 golangci-lint and fmt/lint-fix targets. Conflict: local binary simplicity vs reproducible lint; chose pinned go run path for deterministic CI-like execution. Resolution: go.mod/go.sum initialized, Makefile test/bdd-test/lint/lint-fix/fmt/build/generate-mocks/mutation-test added, .golangci.yml added. Verification: go test ./..., go test -race ./..., go vet ./..., pinned golangci-lint all pass.

title: Epic: BDD Test Suite
description: Godog feature files per behavior. mockgen contract mocks from interfaces. gremlins mutation testing setup. No integration tests.
close_reason: BDD feature files and infrastructure complete

title: Epic: Person B Bootstrap
description: Auto-registration flow when graft.lock references an unknown library. Detect URL from lock, prompt to register and clone, graceful decline handling.
notes: Foundation pass added unknown_library status state and feature scenario. Downstream bootstrap tasks should implement lock-load auto-registration prompt and library add delegation.

title: Epic: Hooks
description: graft install-hooks. Shell hook (zsh/bash rc append). Git post-checkout hook (local only). Idempotent with marker comments. --uninstall cleanup.
notes: Foundation pass added install-hooks command and hooks package with managed markers, non-destructive post-checkout safeguards, atomic rc writes, and uninstall refusal for mixed user hooks. Downstream hook tasks should finish shell-specific detection and broader uninstall tests.

title: Epic: Migration System
description: Migration chain resolver. Step executors: rename, set_default, require_input. Chained multi-version jumps. require_input always prompts regardless of --auto.
notes: Foundation pass added migration chain resolver, rename/set_default/require_input executors, duplicate edge rejection, and cycle detection. Downstream migration tasks should add file discovery tests and CLI/status integration for pending input.

title: Epic: Pin Enforcement
description: Supply chain protection. Pin handler registry with npm/npx, docker, uvx day-one handlers. Hard block on mismatch + --force with confirmation phrase.
notes: Foundation pass added pin.Handler registry with deterministic order, npm/docker/uv handlers, nil-handler defense, force confirmation phrase, and docker arg safety tests. Downstream pin tasks should harden package arg parsing and wire user confirmation into CLI flows.

title: Epic: Sync
description: graft sync command. Auto-pull before applying. Per-MCP atomicity. Resumable. Auth warning system for agent safety.
notes: Foundation pass added sync.Apply skeleton wired to library.Client, render adapters, pin enforcement, duplicate skip reporting, and credential-key auth warnings. Downstream sync tasks should complete auto-pull, per-MCP atomic application, partial failure details, resumable drift processing, and command-level tests.

title: Epic: Drift Detection and Status
description: graft status command. Seven-state detection logic. --quiet (exit code) and --json flags for hooks and scripting.
notes: Foundation pass added seven status states and JSON/quiet status command skeleton. Downstream drift tasks should wire library index lookup, external edit detection, pin mismatch state, and command-level tests.

title: Epic: Render Adapters
description: Adapter layer translating canonical MCP definitions to .mcp.json (Claude Code) and .codex/config.toml (Codex). Open extension interface for future targets.
notes: Foundation pass added render.Adapter, Claude/Codex adapters, generated adapter mock, managed-entry markers, refusal to overwrite unmanaged entries, and atomic target writes. Downstream render tasks should preserve unmanaged config and expand adapter-specific tests.

title: Epic: MCP Selection TUI
description: Bubbletea + lipgloss interactive checkbox picker. Library-grouped, tagged, colored. Idempotent pre-selection of current installed state.
notes: Foundation pass added Bubbletea/lipgloss PickModel and feature scenarios. Downstream pick tasks should wire library grouped data, terminal height scrolling, lock pre-selection, render/remove on confirmation, and command-level tests.

title: Epic: Project Initialization
description: graft init command: target selection (Claude/Codex/both), graft.lock creation, empty target file creation, launch pick.
notes: Foundation pass added graft init command, target creation, lock write after target creation, and executable BDD coverage for both targets. Downstream init tasks should add interactive library/target prompting and launch pick.

title: Epic: Library Authoring
description: Producer-side commands for adding, editing, importing, and pushing MCP definitions to the library repo.
notes: Foundation pass added model.Definition, import parsing for Claude JSON and Codex TOML, WriteDefinitionFile with traversal/collision protection, generated library.Client mock, and authoring feature scenarios. Downstream authoring tasks should complete interactive forms, four-way collision resolution, editor invocation, git commit/push flow, and command-level tests.

title: Epic: Library Management
description: Consumer-side commands for registering, fetching, and browsing git-backed MCP libraries.
notes: Foundation pass added config.Store, library.Client, generated mocks, atomic writes, MCP name validation, collision refusal, and GitClient timeout hooks. Downstream library-management implementation should build on these contracts and add command-level tests for add/list/pull/show.

title: Epic: Project Foundation
description: Go module init, Cobra root command, internal package skeleton per spec layout. Config (user ~/.config/graft/config.json) and lock (graft.lock) read/write packages.
notes: Foundation implemented with six review lanes: /golang-cli, /golang-code-style, /golang-design-patterns, /golang-linter, /golang-safety, /golang-testing. Blocking findings resolved for foundation: command arg validation, exit-code classification, pinned lint, atomic config/lock writes, XDG/cache path safety, command tests. Remaining downstream work stays in child epics for library, render, sync, pin, migration, hooks, TUI, and BDD expansion.
